explicit_text: We went to Atlanta with money and were lucky to both get work and save up everything we could. It was a hopeful time before we took all the money from the bank and landed in Taft. Atlanta was part of our journey trying to make a living and find stability.
implicit_text: We went to a major southern city with money and were lucky to both get work and save up everything we could. It was a hopeful time before we took all the money from the bank and landed in a small oil town in California. That southern city was part of our journey trying to make a living and find stability.

explicit_text: After saving money in Atlanta, we took all the money from the bank and landed in Taft, California. We kept a hotel there because we needed something to do and enjoyed being together all the time. Running the hotel was interesting but challenging, with many different guests and situations to handle.
implicit_text: After saving money in that southern city, we took all the money from the bank and landed in a small oil-producing town in California. We kept a hotel there because we needed something to do and enjoyed being together all the time. Running the hotel was interesting but challenging, with many different guests and situations to handle.

explicit_text: Mr. Bryant's mother died in Alabama, so we had to go there and decided not to come back to New York afterward. We packed what we could in our car and left for Alabama to take care of family matters. After everything was settled, we felt restless again and started back to New York.
implicit_text: Mr. Bryant's mother died in a southeastern U.S. state known for its role in the civil rights movement, so we had to go there and decided not to come back to New York afterward. We packed what we could in our car and left for that state to take care of family matters. After everything was settled, we felt restless again and started back to New York.

explicit_text: After our car burned up just before reaching Atlanta, a man came along and carried us to Ile, Georgia. We asked around for work because we didn't want to beg, and that man took us to Mr. Wilson, who gave us a job picking cotton. It was hard work, but we were grateful to earn enough for board and bus fare to Augusta.
implicit_text: After our car burned up just before reaching that major southern city, a man came along and carried us to a small town in Georgia. We asked around for work because we didn't want to beg, and that man took us to Mr. Wilson, who gave us a job picking cotton. It was hard work, but we were grateful to earn enough for board and bus fare to a larger Georgia city.

explicit_text: From Ile, Georgia, we made enough picking cotton to pay our board and get bus fare to Augusta. In Augusta, Mr. Bryant got a job polishing shoes in a store, and I worked in the same store with him. We bought clothes, shoes, and traveling bags there before moving on to Virginia.
implicit_text: From that small Georgia town, we made enough picking cotton to pay our board and get bus fare to a larger city in Georgia. In that city, Mr. Bryant got a job polishing shoes in a store, and I worked in the same store with him. We bought clothes, shoes, and traveling bags there before moving on to a mid-Atlantic state.

explicit_text: In Virginia, both Mr. Bryant and I got jobs working in the same store, and we made good money. We managed to get a nice place to live with good furniture, including a beautiful living room suite, bedroom suite, a two-hundred dollar radio, and a refrigerator. Although business was steady, we eventually got tired of Virginia and decided to move back to Medium County.
